name: Kuiper Belt Survivor
short_description: Kuiper belt survivor is an arcade style bullet heaven, where every run is endless. It brings a unique spin to the bullet heaven genre by making every part of the players weapon arsenal customizable with well over 10,000 unique weapons to build, and unique stats for every enemy.
detailed_description:
Kuiper belt survivor is an arcade style bullet heaven, where every run is endless. It brings a unique spin to the bullet heaven genre by making every part of the players weapon arsenal customizable with well over 10,000 unique weapons to build and more on the way in future updates.

While the gameplay may look simplistic at first, there is a rich depth to the games level and stat progression with 3 primary forms of player xp and the ability for each weapon to level up individually. There are over 15 types of status effects and special properties that each weapon can have, each enemy has unique defensive stats that require players to be strategic with their weapon design.
